finding_results.notes: Street confrontation now includes a Peter stress-fracture into targeted contempt ("Every office will know... filth you chose") while retaining his legalistic baseline. Repetitive ceremonial threat scaffolding was trimmed ("By month-end..."). Only one ceremonially formal lead-in ("I shall") remains in the chapter.

summary: Implemented dialogue cadence revisions for Peter to preserve low-contraction formal control while introducing pressure-true rupture and contempt in the street confrontation, resolving CH16-F003 with minimal collateral churn.
